name: OneTrust
description: Monitor OneTrust privacy management and GRC platform for user access, data inventory assets, and assessment status

credentialFields.label: OneTrust Hostname
credentialFields.helpText: Your OneTrust hostname (e.g., app.onetrust.com, app-eu.onetrust.com, app-de.onetrust.com, app-uk.onetrust.com, app-apac.onetrust.com)

credentialFields.label: Client ID
credentialFields.helpText: OAuth 2.0 Client ID from OneTrust Global Settings > Access Management > Client Credentials

credentialFields.label: Client Secret
credentialFields.helpText: OAuth 2.0 Client Secret from OneTrust Global Settings > Access Management > Client Credentials

checks.name: Employee Access
checks.description: Lists all users in OneTrust and reports their active/inactive status for access review evidence

checks.name: Systems Description
checks.description: Lists all assets in the OneTrust data inventory to provide evidence of systems tracking and data mapping

checks.name: Monitoring & Alerting
checks.description: Lists all assessments in OneTrust and reports their completion status for audit and monitoring evidence
